daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving curiosity meets clarity. Mercury's got you feeling extra communicative, so trust those impulses to reach out, ask questions, and connect with people in ways that feel authentic to you right now.
daily.love: There's a sweetness in the air around your relationships. Whether you're solo or coupled up, lean into genuine conversations—the kind where you actually say what's on your mind. Vulnerability looks good on you today.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving energy is peaked. That project or idea you've been sitting on? Today's the day to pitch it or at least flesh it out. Your confidence in your own voice is your superpower.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and breath work. Whether that's a walk, some stretching, or just stepping outside for five minutes, honor what feels grounding. Mental clarity flows when you get your energy moving.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is asking you to slow down and actually listen to what people are saying instead of already planning your response. Mercury's got your back, but the real magic happens when you practice presence over performance.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, this is a week to be honest about what you actually want versus what sounds good on paper. Someone might surprise you with genuine effort—notice it.
weekly.career: Your ideas are valuable, but timing matters more than you think. Before pitching that thing, vibe-check the room first. Small moves this week set up bigger momentum later.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity right now. Skip the extreme stuff and lean into what actually feels sustainable. Rest isn't lazy, it's strategic.
